tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: Album: Full Moon / contains all instruments along w/ solos, vocals, and lyrics.

recommended.song_name: The Devil Went Down To Georgia

recommended.version_description: Please note, this tab is based on https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R7f189Z0v0Y (noted as the official video on Willie Nelson's channel with nearly 94 million views as of time of writing). If you are referring to another version there may be slight differences in chords and vocal phrasing/chord alignment.

content:
This is my first song I figured the chords out for. Im glad it was for a song that no 
one has added any chords for! Sounds pretty good on piano, I jam right along as it is in 
the proper key.

Have fun, -Cloud9


Verse 1:
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
Well the eagles been flyin slow[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
And the flags been flyin low[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C/A[/ch]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]
And alotta people say that America's fixin t'fall[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Well speakin just for me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
And some people from TENNESEE[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C/A[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
We got a thing or two to tell you all.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
This lady may have stumbled, but she aint ever fell[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
And if the Russians dont belive that,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
they can all go straight to HELL[/tab]
           [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                
[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]
Were gonna put our feet back on the path, of righteousness and then...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C/A[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]
GOD BLESS AMERICAN AGAIN[/tab]

chrous:
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
And ya never did think that it ever would happen again,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]  (<- optional chords or just bass notes)
In AMERICA did ya[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Ya never did think that we'd ever get together again,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]  (<- optional chords or just bass notes)
Well we DAMN sure fooled ya[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Were walkin real proud and were talkin real loud again[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  (<- optional chords or just bass notes)
___ In AMERICA[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
Ya never did think that it ever would happen again[/tab]
(the BASS riff notes if your interested - 
[ch]F[/ch],[ch]G[/ch],[ch]G[/ch],[ch]F[/ch],[ch]G[/ch],[ch]F[/ch],[ch]Bb[/ch],[ch]G[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch],[ch]C[/ch],[ch]Bb[/ch],[ch]G[/ch],[ch]F[/ch],[ch]Bb[/ch],[ch]G[/ch])


Verse 2:
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
from the sound up in Long Island[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
out to San Francisco bay,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C/A[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
and ev'rything in between it is our home.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
and we may have done alittle bit of fighting amongst ourselves,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C/A[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
but you outside people best leave us alone.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause we'll all stick together, and[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
you can take that to the bank.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
that's the cowboys and the hippies,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
and the rebels and the yanks![/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
you just go lay your hands on[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
a Pittsburgh Steelers fan[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C/A[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
and i think gonna finally understand.[/tab]
